videos.headline: Will Howard connects with Phillip Brooks for a 39-yard K-State TD
videos.description: Kansas State makes it 21-10 on the stroke of halftime via Phillip Brooks' fine 39-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Howard connects with Phillip Brooks for a 39-yard K-State TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Howard finds Jadon Jackson for opening Kansas State TD
videos.description: Kansas State wastes no time vs. Troy as Jadon Jackson hauls in Will Howard's 9-yard dart.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Howard finds Jadon Jackson for opening Kansas State TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Phillip Brooks walks it in to make it 14-0 Kansas State
videos.description: Phillip Brooks meets little resistance as he scores a 2-yard touchdown for Kansas State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Phillip Brooks walks it in to make it 14-0 Kansas State) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chris Lewis makes beautiful one-handed TD catch for Troy
videos.description: This gorgeous one-handed snag by Troy Trojans' Chris Lewis reduces their deficit at Kansas State to 14-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chris Lewis makes beautiful one-handed TD catch for Troy) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
